# 🚀  SEO Dashboard Inside WordPress (see screenshots)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-03-08 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 590

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Did you see the SEO dashboard inside WordPress?

I'm absolutely in love with it.

It lets you monitor your website keyword positions, discover your
top performing SEO content, and see other important SEO metrics
all inside WordPress.

My team at All in One SEO originally built this for me 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..AlWxpyMi4OXh07BvSptlsAVSsl3TrXhjDhkKY9pPIeQ )
, but now you can get access to it as well :)

Check out the screenshot below:

To help you with your SEO efforts, I have put together 30+ SEO
Pro Tips ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..LRXApe4RhsCMKlOAbnGYmxbGiWhMH47P_WakaCVaEz8 ) that you
can use to outrank your competitors.

Ultimate WordPress SEO Guide
----------------------------

Want more people to find your website when they search on Google?

Then here’s the ultimate WordPress SEO guide 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..5j6rQdTo_9WJ7Ji9G0ACKHh_xPcVDjbKG9PSA-Yl6fA ) you’ll need
to read today.

You can learn tons of lessons from the above guide.

I recommend bookmarking it and implementing one lesson at a time.
Soon, you’ll be on your way to improving your search ranking and
organic traffic.

Level up Your SEO Today!
------------------------

Have no time to set up your SEO?

No worries! If you’re tired of tinkering with SEO and seeing
minimal results, you could get help from our SEO experts.

Go ahead and choose an SEO service here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..5j6rQdTo_9WJ7Ji9G0ACKHh_xPcVDjbKG9PSA-Yl6fA ). Talk to our
team today and level up your SEO game.

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
